name: frame
description: Marketplace for the `frame` plugin — frame-space cognitive skills that help the user find, finish, and hand off a frame before any approach is selected. Sibling to the `approach` marketplace; the two compose into the full problem→frame→approach→solution cascade. See plugin ARCHITECTURE.md.

plugins.name: frame
plugins.description: Frame-space skills — find-frame (probe, problem-statement, jtbd, lens, scope, stakes, reframe, from-corpus) + finish-frame (devil, audience-pivot) + composer meta-skill. Frame-only, never executes.
